title: Tangy Tender French Chicken Casserole
description: A delicious and healthy French-inspired casserole featuring tender chicken, tangy flavors, and fresh cilantro, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This low-calorie-friendly dish is easy to make and packed with flavor.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together cream cheese, Greek yogurt, Dijon mustard, lemon juice, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper until smooth.
Add the chopped cilantro leaves to the bowl and stir to combine.
In a separate bowl, toss the chicken breast pieces with a pinch of salt and pepper until coated.
Add the cooked whole wheat pasta to the bowl with the chicken and toss to combine.
Pour the cream cheese mixture over the chicken and pasta, and stir until everything is well coated.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13-inch baking dish and smooth the top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the top is lightly browned.
Remove from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
